zh.Kilburn, North Yorkshire, England, Unite: 英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾吉爾本
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Kirby於1579年出生在英國越可爾吉爾本時，她的父親Sir Richard Kirby50歲，母親Mary Chambers47歲。她於1595年與Richard Day在英國越可爾吉爾本結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1609年4月4日在她的家鄉享年30歲。

zh-hans.Kilburn, North Yorkshire, England, Unite: 英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾吉爾本
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Kirby于1579年出生在英国越可爾吉爾本时，她的父亲Sir Richard Kirby50岁，母亲Mary Chambers47岁。她于1595年与Richard Day在英国越可爾吉爾本结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1609年4月4日在她的家乡享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kirby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in northern and eastern England called Kirby or Kirkby, from Old Norse kirkja ‘church’ + bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.
Irish: adopted for Ó Garmhaic ‘descendant of Cíarmhac’, a personal name meaning ‘dark son’. Compare Kerwick .
Irish: Anglicized form of Mac Geirble ‘son of Geirble’, a personal name of uncertain origin. The name is preserved in the townland name of Carrowkeribly in County Mayo.

variants.name: Kerwick
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Garmhaic, more commonly Anglicized as Kirby .

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Kirby was born in 1579, in Kilburn, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Richard Kirby, was 50 and her mother, Mary Chambers, was 47. She married Richard Day in 1595, in Kilburn, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 4 April 1609, in her hometown, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Kirby est née en 1579, à Kilburn, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Kirby, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Mary Chambers, avait 47 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Day en 1595, à Kilburn, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 avril 1609, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Kirby 1579 in Kilburn, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Kirby 50 und ihre Mutter Mary Chambers 47. Sie hat 1595 in Kilburn, Yorkshire, England Richard Day geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. April 1609 im Alter von 30 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei sposato Richard Day nel 1595, nel Kilburn, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 4 aprile 1609, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Kirbyが1579年にイギリスヨークシュアイアキルブルンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Kirbyは50歳，母Mary Chambersは47歳であった。1595年にイギリスヨークシュアイアキルブルンでRichard Dayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1609年4月4日に故郷で30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Kirby(이)가 1579년 영국 요르크실르 킬번에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Kirby(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Chambers(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 1595년 영국 요르크실르 킬번에서 Richard Day(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1609년 4월 4일 그녀의 고향에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Richard Day em 1595, em Kilburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de abril de 1609, em sua cidade natal, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Kirby родилась в 1579 г. в местности килбурн, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Kirby было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Chambers, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Day в 1595 г. в местности килбурн, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 4 апреля 1609 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 30 лет.
